query:
SELECT p.batchNo, SUM(CASE WHEN se.countForProductivity = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS countable_complete_events, COUNT(DISTINCT se.id) AS total_complete_events, COUNT(psd.id) AS remaining_productivity_details
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025007','00500025004','00500024968','00500025035','00500025029')
GROUP BY p.batchNo
ORDER BY p.batchNo;

LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
